hero.tagline: The best for the most complex.
hero.description: Denmark's largest dedicated zinc die-casting foundry. From simple brackets to the most intricate geometries — tolerances to ±0.05 mm, with casting, machining, coating, and assembly all under one roof.
hero.heroImageAlt: Precision zinc die-casting mold with brass fittings

services.heading: Full-service zinc die-casting
services.description: Every step from concept to finished component under one roof. One foundry. Zero handoffs.

items.name: Prototypes
items.description: Rapid prototyping and small-batch validation runs.

items.name: Post-Processing
items.description: CNC machining, deburring, and precision trimming.

items.name: Surface Coating
items.description: Chrome, paint, powder coating, and anodizing.

items.name: Quality Assurance
items.description: ISO 9001 certified CMM inspection and SPC.

imageAlts.cncMachining: CNC machining of precision zinc die-cast component

whyLinimatic.heading: Built for the jobs others walk away from.
whyLinimatic.description: 55+ years of exclusive focus on zinc die-casting. Not general metalwork. Not aluminum on the side. Every machine, every operator, every process optimised for one material — so when the geometry gets difficult, we don’t improvise. We draw on decades of proven solutions.
whyLinimatic.imageAlt: CNC machining of zinc die-cast component

bulletPoints.title: Complex geometry expertise
bulletPoints.description: Thin walls, deep ribs, intricate cores — the features that separate difficult parts from simple ones

bulletPoints.title: ±0.05mm repeatability
bulletPoints.description: Consistent tolerances across production runs of 10,000 or 5,000,000 parts

bulletPoints.title: Zero-handoff value chain
bulletPoints.description: Casting, CNC, coating, and assembly in one facility — no coordination risk between suppliers

bulletPoints.title: Quality that eliminates returns
bulletPoints.description: ISO 9001 certified, CMM-verified, SPC-monitored — problems caught before they ship

whereWeShine.heading: What sets us apart
whereWeShine.description: We handle everything from simple brackets to the most demanding precision components. Here’s where our 55 years of specialisation really show.

items.title: Complex geometry
items.description: Thin walls, deep ribs, undercuts — zinc die-casting can achieve remarkable geometry, and our tooling team has decades of experience getting it right first time.

items.title: Consistent precision
items.description: Tolerances to ±0.05 mm maintained across the full production run. Whether it’s part 50 or part 500,000, the quality is the same.

items.title: Surface-ready finish
items.description: From Class A chrome to precision-painted finishes, our castings are designed for visible applications where surface quality matters.

items.title: One responsible partner
items.description: Casting, CNC machining, surface coating, inspection, and assembly under one roof. One point of contact, one quality system, faster lead times.

items.title: Prototype to full production
items.description: The same team and tooling handles your project from a 100-piece validation run all the way to 5 million units per year in steady production.

items.title: Reliable delivery
items.description: Kanban agreements, forecast planning, and a track record built over 55 years. When we commit to a schedule, we deliver.

items.title: Tight-tolerance power tool internals no other foundry would quote
Casting a design icon — where surface perfection is non-negotiable
items.metric: Visible brackets for a classic Finn Juhl chair

items.title: Reshoring a part that failed overseas — and exceeding the original spec
items.metric: Full local value chain, tighter tolerances than import

whyZinc.heading: Why zinc die-casting?
whyZinc.description: Superior precision, longer tooling life, faster production cycles, and exceptional surface quality — outperforming aluminum and plastic alternatives.

cta.heading: Let’s talk about your next project.
cta.description: Send us your drawings or specifications and we’ll tell you exactly what’s achievable — simple or complex. Response within 24 hours.

footer.brandDescription: Denmark’s largest dedicated zinc die-casting foundry. Precision zamak components from prototype to series production.
